since_last: 35% of 86 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +2.68%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 35% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.48% · BTC +1.64% · Gold -0.35% · Nasdaq100 -0.53%. 35% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +2.68%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +2.68%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -3.06%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMCI is the standout at +16.37%
cards.body: Leaders: SMCI +16.37%, VRT +5.91%, PWR +5.13%, INTC +5.00%, MU +4.94%. Laggards: SPCX -14.12%, AVAV -10.90%, ARM -7.23%, PLTR -7.04%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -14.12% at $158.88
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -14.12% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
